mapper.select: SELECT id, examine FROM ice WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id FROM iet
AND id IN
#{it}
AND 1 = 2
mapper.update: UPDATE ice SET frame = #{dto.frame}, customer = #{dto.customer}, `time` = #{dto.time}, `number` = #{dto.number}, total = #{dto.total}, actual = #{dto.actual}, money = #{dto.money}, account = #{dto.account}, people = #{dto.people}, `file` = #{dto.file}, `data` = #{dto.data}, `more` = #{dto.more}, `user` = #{dto.user} WHERE id = #{dto.id} AND (examine IS NULL OR examine = 0)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ice_info (id, pid, iet, money, `data`) VALUES
(REPLACE(UUID(),'-',''), #{dto.id}, #{it.iet}, #{it.money}, #{it.data})
mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM ice WHERE examine = 1 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ice (id, frame, customer, `time`, `number`, total, actual, money, account, people, `file`, `data`, `more`, examine, nucleus, `user`) VALUES
(#{it.id}, #{it.frame}, #{it.customer}, #{it.time}, #{it.number}, #{it.total}, #{it.actual}, #{it.money}, #{it.account}, #{it.people}, #{it.file}, #{it.data}, #{it.more}, #{it.examine}, #{it.nucleus}, #{it.user})

INSERT INTO ice_info (id, pid, iet, money, `data`) VALUES
(#{it.id}, #{it.pid}, #{it.iet}, #{it.money}, #{it.data})

INSERT INTO ice_bill (id, pid, `type`, `source`, `time`, money) VALUES
(#{it.id}, #{it.pid}, #{it.type}, #{it.source}, #{it.time}, #{it.money})
